summary: Comprehensive test suite with strong unit test coverage of core semver logic (parsing, bumping, changelog generation) and thorough workflow structure validation. Workflow tests check triggers, jobs, dependencies, security hygiene, and script references. Integration harness validates end-to-end execution via act with fixture-driven testing. Well-organized with clear test separation (unit/workflow/harness). Good test isolation via temp directories and cleanup. Gaps: limited edge-case coverage (malformed JSON, file permission errors, invalid inputs), unit tests only validate happy path and basic error scenarios, no explicit tests shown for the CLI entrypoint bump-version.ps1 itself. Fixtures are referenced extensively by harness but their definitions not shown—assessment assumes they exist and are complete. Would reliably catch regressions in standard scenarios and workflow structure changes, though some error-handling edge cases lack coverage.
